children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Chief of the Forest Service, may use funds derived from conservation-related programs executed on National Forest System land to utilize the Agriculture Conservation Experienced Services Program established pursuant to to provide technical services for conservation-related programs and authorities carried out by the Secretary on National Forest System land.section 3851 of this title

children.heading: Termination of effectiveness
children.label: b Termination of effectiveness
children.text: The authority provided to the Secretary to carry out this section terminates effective .October 1, 20231See Extension of Forest Service Participation in Aces Program note below.1
